subject: Updating ElasticSearch version to 6.1.2
commit_message:
Updating ElasticSearch version to 6.1.2

Setting the correct image path
Adding config files
Updating elasticsearch yml config for 6.1.2

Change-Id: I1795d2c4201657377cc06f5fb6914ed5b93f3c24
Issue-ID: AAI-1440
Signed-off-by: Edwin Lawrance <Edwin.Lawrance@amdocs.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1:

just a question on why 6.12 - anything particular in that release required.
Just asking this because there is an activity to standardize elasticsearch elk stacks in Clamp, Logging, POMBA, SDC etc...
https://jira.onap.org/browse/OOM-1101

Patch Set 1:

This is the version supported by AT&T at the moment by their customized searchguard service.
Patch Set 2: Patch Set 1 was rebased

Patch Set 6: -Code-Review

Could you please merge this? is blocking our current sprint.

Patch Set 6:

Hi All, 
Though i am using 6.3.1 in common Charting for elasticsearch as that was the highest version and clamp, log and pomba works fine with this .. But if somebody wants to use any other version , they can anyhow override image in values.yaml.

Regards,
Priyanka Jain.

Patch Set 6:

(2 comments)

Please change the license (at least in the newly added files. Better in all this chart.)
